System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference N_PZ1A_DMC_CAN_FD_VC_20200902_20201023T043505.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 2000000
Send ID 18DA69F2
Receive ID 18DAF269
Functional Addr 69
Functional Name DMC
